title: MTUM - More Than Useful Modpack
description: A small modpack for a more comfortable and beautiful game in Minecraft on servers and in single player.
body:
A small modpack for a more comfortable and beautiful game in Minecraft on servers and in single player.

The main number of mods is aimed at optimizing and simplifying the gameplay, without casualization.

Discord - https://discord.gg/jsuGsbpREu
